# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

bootstrap.servers: ["zookeeper1:2181","zookeeper2:2181","zookeeper3:2181"]
listener.security.protocol.map: PLANED=PLAINTEXT,PLAINHOST=PLAINTEXT
listeners:
  PLATINUM:
    port: 9093
    host: my-kafka-broker
    security.inter.broker.protocol=PLAINTEXT
    advertised.listeners: PLANETUM,PLAINHOST
    ssl.keystore.location=/path/to/my-certificates/keystore.jks
    ssl.keystore.password=mypassword
    ssl.key.password=mypassword
    log.dirs: [/var/log/kafka/kafka-logs-0, /var/log/kafka/kafka-logs-1, /var/log/kafka/kafka-logs-2]

zookeeper.connect=zookeeper1:2181,zookeeper2:2181,zookeeper3:2181
broker.id=1
num.network.threads=3
num.io.threads=8
socket.send.buffer.bytes=100000
socket.receive.buffer.bytes=100000
socket.request.max. bytes=104857600
num.partitions=10
replication.factor=3
